titleStmt.title: SII 9.571: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 571. (A.R. No. 245 of 1913.) ON A STONE IN FRONT OF THE NANDI-MANDAPA OF THE DODDAPADESVARA TEMPLE AT MODALLI, KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1456, Jaya, Phālguṇa, śu. 5, Ravivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1535 February 7, Sunday, in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Mādappayya, agent of Rāmappayya, a minister to the king, made a grant of the income from ārati-kāṇike and bēḍige for the service of the god Mallikārjunadēva in Haḷe-Mōḍahaḷḷi near Mōḍahaḷḷi in Hadināḍu-sīme, thus reviving the defunct service. The gift was made for the merit of the king and of Rāmappayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhava[stu .*] svasti śrījayābhyudaya
śālīvāhanaśakavaruṣa 1456 neya ja
yasaṁvatsarada phālguna śuda 5 miyū
ravyavāsaradallū śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājā
dhirāja ṭhājaparamēśvara śrīvīravijeyā
bhiṣēkādyaparimitaparākrama Acuta
rāyamahārāyarū pruthvīrājyaṁge
Uttiralū tatsāṁbrājyadhuraṁdharabā
giyādaṁthā rāmappayyanavara nāya
ketanakke pāḷisida hadināḍasīmege
saluva mōḍahaḷḷiya sthaḷada haḷeya
mōḍahaḷiyali jagaddhitārththavā
gi prasaṁnavāda mallikārjunadēvarige
rāmappayyanavara kā(ṁ)ryyakartā rā
da mādappayyanavarū rāmappayya
navarige sakala sāṁbrājyavāga
bēkeṁdu śrīmallikārjunadēvara Aṁ
garaṁgabhōgakke saluvaṁthā grāma
kṣētragaḷanū sithilavāgi hōgutti
ralāgi mādappayyanavarū jīrnōddhāra
va māḍi Accutarāyamahārāyari gū rā
mapayyanavarigū dharmmavāgabēkeṁdu
mādappayyanavarū śrī mallikārjunadē
varalli Āratīnu tegadukoṁḍu bāha saṁ
baṁdha Āratikāṇike bēḍigeyanū
biṭṭu dēvara grāmadali biṭṭevāgi yēna
nu māḍalilla muṁde Āvanobanu
Anyāyava māḍidare vāraṇāśi
yalli kapileya koṁda pāpakke hō
hanū bramaṇana koṁda pāpakke hōha
nu tāya taṁdeyanu koṁda pāpakke
hōhanu

nā
yiṁdraḥ pṛcchati
cāṁḍālīṁ
kimidaṁ pacya
tē tvayā
svānamāṁsaṁ
sureyā siktaṁ
kapālēna ci
tāgninā . tēṣāṁ
pādarajōbhītyā
carmaṇā pihi
taṁ mayā . svada
ttādviguṇaṁ pu(ṁ)
ṇyaṁ paradattānu
(paradattānu)pā
lanaṁ . paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ
niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 9.571 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
